name: PyBullet Planner
description: Create a PyBulletPlanner that manages its own in-process PyBullet physics server (no ROS). Pass a RobotCell and it connects, builds the planner, and applies set_robot_cell. Supports collision checking, FK/IK and Cartesian motion; free-space plan_motion is not yet implemented for this backend.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: RobotCell to plan against. Applied to the planner via set_robot_cell on every run.

inputParameters.name: connection_type
inputParameters.description: 'direct' (headless, recommended on the canvas) or 'gui' (opens a separate PyBullet window for visualization, where a display is available). A dropdown is auto-created. Defaults to 'direct'.

outputParameters.name: planner
outputParameters.description: PyBulletPlanner with its robot cell loaded, ready for FK/IK/Cartesian motion.
